prompt: Generate AI use cases for this prospect: E-commerce brand selling handmade jewelry, 8 employees, they spend 4+ hours a day on customer support emails and manually tracking inventory across their Shopify store and a spreadsheet. Getting a lot of returns they have to process manually too.

assertions.text: Output contains exactly 3 use case sections
Each use case includes at least one specific metric — a number, percentage, time range, or dollar range — in the ROI field
Each use case contains a 'Hook:' line with an outreach-ready sentence in quotes
Use cases cover at least two different dimensions (operational efficiency, revenue/growth, customer experience) — not all three on the same theme
Use cases reference specific details from the input (e.g., Shopify, inventory, returns, support emails) — not generic 'AI automation' descriptions
Output ends with a quick pitch summary section containing 3 bullets
